settings.title: Relevant partners
settings.text: Accountants, consultants, advisers, brokers, marketers, industry specialists, and business service providers may all identify suitable marketplace leads.

settings.title: Referral context
settings.text: Useful context includes the person’s goal, budget range, time frame, current business situation, and preferred pathway.

settings.title: Clear routing
settings.text: Referrals can be routed toward templates, Business-In-A-Box offers, seller listings, asset reviews, or custom build discussions.

settings.heading: Partner and referral pathways
settings.text: Referral partners can introduce buyers, sellers, business owners, consultants, or operators who may benefit from marketplace offers or build support.
